message:
🐛 Fix cache guard to handle all data shapes (not just arrays) (#2778)

The previous guard (PR #2774) only prevented cache wipe for empty
arrays. Cards with object initialData (like HardwareHealth with
{alerts:[], inventory:[], nodeCount:0}) were still being overwritten
on refresh when the fetcher returned the same empty-object shape.

New isEquivalentToInitial() handles:
- Empty arrays ([] === [])
- Objects with all-empty/zero fields (JSON comparison)
- Null/undefined

This fixes PredictiveHealth, HardwareHealth, and any future cards
with non-array initialData going blank on browser refresh.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
